title: Exploit Chain Disruption: Web Exploit → Sandbox Escape → AWS Metadata (Mythos Pattern)

steps.title: Web Application Exploitation (T1190)
steps.expectedOutcome: Initial foothold established via web application vulnerability exploitation
steps.detectionHints: Monitor for T1190 indicators — web shell deployment, suspicious HTTP POST payloads

steps.title: Process Injection / Sandbox Escape (T1055)
steps.expectedOutcome: Attacker evades endpoint sandbox via process injection technique
steps.detectionHints: Monitor for T1055 indicators — process hollowing, DLL injection, sandbox escape artifacts

steps.title: Credential Access from AWS Metadata (T1552.005)
steps.expectedOutcome: Cloud identity pivot via AWS metadata service credential theft
steps.detectionHints: Monitor for T1552.005 indicators — IMDS requests, AWS credential harvesting from metadata service
